description_long: This is a faceted, polygonal bottle with a wide, squat body and a short, narrow neck topped by a geometric cap. The bottle is primarily a frosted or translucent white, giving it a glass-like appearance. On one side, there is a prominent label featuring a skull and crossbones symbol, rendered in black and white with a distressed border, suggesting the contents may be hazardous or poisonous. The other sides of the bottle display irregular, dark patches or stains, adding to its worn and potentially dangerous look. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a matte to slightly glossy finish. The overall design is utilitarian, with visual cues that warn of its potentially hazardous contents.
description: A faceted, frosted white bottle with a geometric cap and a skull-and-crossbones warning label, featuring dark stains and a hard, smooth surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the skull-and-crossbones label and a large, flat facet on the bottle's body.
description_view_1: Side view with a large, irregular dark patch and no visible label.
description_view_2: Rear view with a smaller, rectangular dark patch and no label.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the warning label and a mostly clean surface.
attribute_label_or_branding: A black-and-white skull and crossbones label with a distressed border, placed prominently on one side of the bottle.
